title: Salsa Roja (Red Salsa)

ingredients.title: Ingredients (About 2 cups)
items: 2–3 medium red jalapeños or serrano chiles (adjust heat preference)

instruction.title: Roast the Vegetables (Optional but recommended)
steps: Preheat a skillet or comal over medium-high heat.
Roast tomatoes, chiles, onion, and garlic until slightly charred and softened (8–10 min).

instruction.title: Blend the Salsa
steps: Transfer roasted vegetables to a blender or food processor.
Add cilantro, lime juice, salt, and pepper.
Blend until smooth or slightly chunky if preferred.

instruction.title: Taste & Adjust
steps: Add more salt, lime, or chiles if needed.
Strain for a smoother restaurant-style texture (optional).

instruction.title: Serve
steps: Chill slightly or serve at room temperature.
Great with tacos, tortilla chips, grilled meats, or eggs.

chefTips: Roma or vine-ripened tomatoes give better flavor and less wateriness.
Roasting enhances sweetness and smoky depth.
Lime juice balances acidity and brightens flavor.
Straining gives restaurant-style smooth salsa, but texture feels more homemade.
